expectations.text: NO static \Drupal:: service calls in ANY PHP class under src/

Config install defaults file with ALL keys

expectations.evidence: No `options:` section or `_admin_route` key on settings route
No getEntityIds() override in ProjectListBuilder or TaskListBuilder

expectations.text: Entity base table names prefixed with module name

Project.php line 41: "owner" = "uid". Task.php line 41: "owner" = "uid". Key mapping present (EntityOwnerTrait not used but key is correct).
